title: The Case of the Missing Mango
synopsis: When Lily's favorite mango tree is mysteriously stripped bare overnight, she becomes a detective to solve the case. Following clues through the African savanna, she discovers a family of hungry monkeys and learns about sharing and understanding.

pages.text: Lily loved her morning walks to the big mango tree. Every day, she would pick one sweet, juicy mango for breakfast. The tree was tall and full of bright orange fruit.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes walking toward a tall mango tree heavy with orange fruit in a savanna landscape, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm golden grass, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Lily walking toward a mango tree full of fruit

pages.text: But this morning was different. Lily gasped when she saw the tree. It was completely empty! Not one mango was left on any branch. Even the ground was clean.

illustration.description: A shocked girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes standing before a bare mango tree with no fruit, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, orange sunset sky, bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Lily looking surprised at the empty mango tree

pages.text: "This is very strange," said Lily. "Yesterday the tree was full. Today it's empty. I need to solve this mystery!" She put on her thinking cap and looked around carefully.

illustration.description: A determined girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes examining the base of the empty tree, painted in gouache with textured painterly style, golden grass, expressive pose, thick brushstrokes
illustration.alt: Lily investigating around the empty mango tree

pages.text: Lily walked around the tree trunk. She found something interesting. There were small hand prints in the soft dirt. The prints had long fingers and looked very different from her own hands.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes crouching down and pointing at small handprints in the dirt, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Lily discovering handprints in the dirt near the tree

pages.text: "These prints are a clue!" Lily said excitedly. She followed the trail of prints. They led away from the mango tree and into the tall golden grass of the savanna.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes following a trail through tall golden grass, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes, orange sunset, warm colors, expressive landscape
illustration.alt: Lily following handprints through the savanna grass

pages.text: As Lily walked, she found more clues. There were broken twigs on the ground. There were also orange mango peels scattered along the path. Someone had been eating mangoes while walking!

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes picking up orange mango peels from the ground, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Lily examining mango peels on the ground

pages.text: The trail led Lily to a group of acacia trees. She heard strange sounds coming from above. "Chatter, chatter, chatter!" went the sounds. "Ook, ook, ook!"

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes looking up at acacia trees with a puzzled expression, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, orange sunset sky, warm savanna colors, expressive pose
illustration.alt: Lily listening to sounds coming from the acacia trees

pages.text: Lily looked up into the trees. She saw movement in the branches. Something was swinging from tree to tree. It was brown and furry and very fast!

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes shading her eyes with her hand while looking up, with blurry brown shapes moving through tree branches above, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Lily watching something move quickly through the tree branches

pages.text: "I need to get closer," Lily whispered to herself. She walked very quietly toward the trees. She didn't want to scare away whatever was making those sounds.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes tiptoeing carefully toward the trees with one finger to her lips, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, golden grass, warm savanna colors, expressive animals visible as shadows
illustration.alt: Lily sneaking quietly toward the acacia trees

pages.text: Lily hid behind a large rock and peeked out. In the trees above, she saw a whole family of monkeys! There was a mama monkey, a papa monkey, and three little baby monkeys.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes hiding behind a rock and peering out, with expressive monkeys visible in the trees above, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Lily hiding behind a rock watching a family of monkeys in the trees

pages.text: The monkeys were eating mangoes! They had sticky orange juice on their faces and hands. The baby monkeys were chattering happily as they shared the sweet fruit with each other.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes watching expressive monkeys eating mangoes in the trees, orange mango juice visible on their faces, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes, orange sunset, warm colors
illustration.alt: Lily observing the monkey family eating mangoes

pages.text: "So the monkeys took all my mangoes!" Lily said. But then she looked more carefully. The baby monkeys looked very thin. She realized they must have been very hungry.

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes looking concerned while watching thin baby monkeys in the trees, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, textured painterly style, expressive animals, warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Lily looking worried as she notices the thin baby monkeys

pages.text: Lily felt sorry for the hungry monkey family. She remembered that her grandmother had planted many fruit trees around their home. There were enough mangoes to share!

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with a thoughtful, kind expression looking toward other fruit trees in the distance, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, golden grass, orange sunset, warm colors
illustration.alt: Lily thinking kindly while looking at other fruit trees

pages.text: Lily came out from behind the rock. "Hello, monkey family," she called softly. "I know you were hungry. You can have mangoes from my other trees too. There are plenty for everyone!"

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes waving friendly to expressive monkeys in the trees above, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style, happy expressions
illustration.alt: Lily greeting the monkey family in a friendly way

pages.text: The monkeys chattered excitedly and swung down to meet Lily. From that day on, they shared the mangoes together. Lily had solved her mystery and made new friends too!

illustration.description: A girl with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sitting happily with the expressive monkey family around mango trees full of fruit, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, orange sunset, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Lily and the monkey family sharing mangoes together under the trees

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What did Lily find when she first got to the mango tree?
choices: The tree had more mangoes than ever
questions.explanation: Lily was surprised to find that the mango tree was completely empty with no fruit left on any branch.

questions.question: What clues did Lily find to solve the mystery?
questions.explanation: Lily found small handprints in the dirt and orange mango peels scattered along a trail.

questions.question: What sounds did Lily hear coming from the acacia trees?
questions.explanation: Lily heard 'chatter, chatter, chatter' and 'ook, ook, ook' sounds coming from the trees above.

questions.question: Who had taken all the mangoes?
questions.explanation: Lily discovered that a family of monkeys - mama, papa, and three babies - had taken the mangoes.

questions.question: How did Lily solve the problem?
choices: She decided to share mangoes from other trees
She built a fence around the tree
questions.explanation: Lily felt sorry for the hungry monkey family and offered to share mangoes from her other fruit trees.
